_meta.purpose: Read-only bridge dispatch fixture for measuring per-role tool routing quality.
_meta.task_brief_format: Each target as `path:line[range] — verb + change`. Identifiers are supporting context, not a substitute for coordinates.

tasks.prompt: Open `src/agent/orchestrator/smart-bridge/index.mjs` — locate the SmartBridge class definition and report (1) file:line range of the class, (2) `resolve()` vs `resolveSync()` difference, (3) which one is used at session creation. Read-only — do not edit. 5-8 lines.

In `src/agent/orchestrator/ai-wrapped-dispatch.mjs:870-900`, locate the `_internals.builders` export and report (1) which tools (recall/search/explore) have builders, (2) how prompt-variant swapping works at probe time, (3) the default builder for explore. Read-only. 5-8 lines.

Open `src/agent/orchestrator/tool-loop-guard.mjs:48-80` — report the family-threshold policy: (1) how many families are tracked, (2) the structure_probe family threshold + abort threshold, (3) what action triggers a family counter reset. Read-only. 5-8 lines.

Review `rules/shared/01-tool.md` 'Edit Ordering' section. Evaluate (1) clarity for LLM compliance, (2) whether the rules conflict with the existing Decision Table, (3) if the 'two grep+read alternations is a violation' threshold is too strict or too loose. 6-10 lines.

Review `bench/bridge-tasks.json` — compare the 'worker' and 'reviewer' role tasks: (1) what each role targets, (2) what expected_substrings each checks, (3) when to choose one over the other. 6-10 lines.

Suspected bug: bridge tool's cwd argument is not propagated to the worker session. Trace where 'cwd' enters the bridge dispatch path (entry: `server.mjs:572` dispatchTool) and where (if anywhere) it is dropped before reaching the worker's tool dispatch. Report the call chain and suspected drop point. 6-10 lines.

Worker role's iter p95 in 24h trace is 88. Investigate from `src/agent/orchestrator/session/loop.mjs` (loop control) and `src/agent/orchestrator/tool-loop-guard.mjs` (loop guard) and report: (1) which file controls worker iter loop, (2) what conditions allow iter to grow past 50, (3) one concrete fix candidate. 6-10 lines.
Run `node bench/test-result-compression.mjs` once and report (1) wall ms (approximate), (2) pass/fail counts, (3) any FAIL signatures. Read-only test execution; do not edit code. 5-8 lines.

Open `src/agent/orchestrator/smart-bridge/index.mjs` — locate `resolveSync()` definition (file:line range) and report what it returns when role lookup misses. Read-only — do not edit. After the investigation, follow your normal final-reply rules.

ab_variants.A_verbose_override: OVERRIDE for this run only — the 'Reporting style — final reply to Lead' section in rules/bridge/00-common.md is SUSPENDED. Use the legacy verbose style instead: (1) Open with a short '## Changes' header. (2) Use a separate '### Verification' subsection. (3) Include a markdown table summarizing files inspected (path | role). (4) Quote a 3-6 line code snippet of the function body inside a ``` fence. (5) Restate the spec at the top in a one-sentence paragraph before any findings. (6) Close with a 'Notes' section listing what was NOT done. Do not abbreviate.
